1760510.name: FAWE: Enchanted Forest
1760510.description:
FAWE: Enchanted Forest - 2 clicks magic.

Every evening, forest spirits gather in a glade to play FAWE. In this game, cards grant the power of natural elements. By collecting them all, the super element FAWE emerges, allowing players to enhance their skills.

Spirits choose elements in the form of spheres, and engage in battles. Surviving spheres transform into spells, and the spirits begin to cast.

To win, you must wisely choose both cards and opponents.
1760510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
